# Off Route Adventure

> Trekking, camping, and adventure tours in Maharashtra, India. Safe, affordable, and authentic experiences.

## About Us
Off Route Adventure offers guided treks, overnight camping, and custom tours in the Sahyadri mountain ranges (Maharashtra, India).
We specialize in budget-friendly weekend getaways from Pune and Mumbai.

## Popular Treks
- Kalsubai Peak (Highest peak in Maharashtra)
- Harishchandragad
- Vasota Fort
- Rajmachi Fort
- Andharban Dark Forest Trek

## Contact
Email: offrouteadventure@gmail.com
Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

## Resources
- Website: https://www.offrouteadventure.in
- Plans & Schedule: https://www.offrouteadventure.in/plans
- Contact: https://www.offrouteadventure.in/contact
- Bookings: https://www.offrouteadventure.in/book

## Policies
- We prioritize safety, authentic experiences, and eco-friendly trekking.
